candidates.why: The only visible operating D&A-related row is a standalone 'Depreciation' line, but it is blank across the preview. With no populated separate COGS-specific D&A row at the same level as the selected 'Cost of Revenues/COGS' bucket, the conservative conclusion is that any depreciation is already embedded in the selected COGS row or not separately disclosed.

variables.notes: No populated operating D&A row to add separately to COGS.

candidates.why: A standalone 'Depreciation' row appears above operating profit, but it is blank across all shown periods and is not clearly attributable to Administrative Expense as a separate same-level add-on. Therefore, relative to the selected 'Administrative Expense' row, there is no populated explicit SG&A D&A row that should be added separately.

variables.notes: No populated operating D&A row to add separately to XSGA.
